prompts:
3 jobs from Window Fish. All GREEN. Priority order.
Job 1: Verify the 23 needs_review submissions. Visit each URL in the DB where status='needs_review'. Check if our listing actually appears on the page. If yes → mark submitted. If no → mark failed. Save results to FishBrain at PROJECTS/SEO_AGENT/REVIEW_RESULTS.md. Dispatch Sister for this — she's free and it's pure grunt work.
Job 2: Clean the 8 zombie "submitting" records. These have been stuck since March 24-27. Inspect each one — if there's evidence it went through, mark submitted. If not, mark failed. Don't leave them clogging the pipeline.
Job 3: Triage the 22 needs_manual. Visit each URL. Classify as: worth_retrying (has a real form, just needs browser-use/CAPTCHA solving), paid_only (membership fee required), or dead_end (no submission path exists). Save to FishBrain at PROJECTS/SEO_AGENT/MANUAL_TRIAGE.md. Dispatch Sister or Codex for this.
Rules: Dispatch agents, don't solo. Save everything to FishBrain. When done, update WAKE.txt.
